summary:
# 今日社区动态

## Feature速看
- 🔍 **BPF测试增强**：添加了针对`sync_linked_regs`中zext（零扩展）传播的测试用例，确保寄存器同步时零扩展行为正确 [selftests/bpf: Add a test cases for sync_linked_regs regarding zext propagation](#lkml-art_1774439410581_nqsakymqc)

- 🔒 **IPv6 SRv6安全修复**：在SRv6相关代码路径中添加了`idev`指针的NULL检查，防止潜在的空指针解引用，提升内核稳定性 [ipv6: add NULL checks for idev in SRv6 paths](#lkml-art_1774439412428_p78izia9w)

- 🧪 **BPF标量处理测试**：扩展了`maybe_fork_scalars()`函数的测试覆盖，验证OR和AND操作的正确处理逻辑 [selftests/bpf: Add tests for maybe_fork_scalars() OR vs AND handling](#lkml-art_1774439410670_rcejdib1p)

- ⚠️ **BPF除法边界测试**：添加了`sdiv32/smod32`指令对`INT_MIN`被除数的边界条件测试，确保除法和取模运算在极端输入下行为正确 [selftests/bpf: Add tests for sdiv32/smod32 with INT_MIN dividend](#lkml-art_1774439410763_amvro2xvc)

## Bugfix
- 🔧 **BPF异常处理修复**：修复了子程序中BPF异常退出的锁检查问题，同时添加了对应的测试用例以验证bpf_throw在子程序中的锁泄漏问题 [bpf: Fix exception exit lock checking for subprogs](#lkml-art_1774439410895_dptwommxc) [selftests/bpf: Add tests for bpf_throw lock leak from subprogs](#lkml-art_1774439410844_atgehydxb)

- 🛡️ **空指针解引用修复**：修复了多个模块中的空指针解引用问题，包括ICMP标签验证、UDP隧道（IPv6配置为n时）、以及bonding驱动的调试函数中的潜在崩溃 [icmp: fix NULL pointer dereference in icmp_tag_validation()](#lkml-art_1774439411436_grayv3wve) [udp_tunnel: fix NULL deref caused by udp_sock_create6 when CONFIG_IPV6=n](#lkml-art_1774439412221_cvm5l7l0j) [net: bonding: fix NULL deref in bond_debug_rlb_hash_show](#lkml-art_1774439412181_xlnl95cxq)

- 📊 **网络驱动资源泄漏修复**：修复了bcm_sf2 DSA交换机驱动在错误路径中遗漏的clk_disable_unprepare()调用，以及macb驱动中PTP时钟的use-after-free和rx_fs_lock未初始化问题 [net: dsa: bcm_sf2: fix missing clk_disable_unprepare() in error paths](#lkml-art_1774439411477_mz9y87z2u) [net: macb: fix uninitialized rx_fs_lock](#lkml-art_1774439412511_u6qfzj9dl) [net: macb: fix use-after-free access to PTP clock](#lkml-art_1774439412552_svcewed7a)

- 🐛 **BPF解释器稳定性修复**：修复了INT_MIN整数溢出导致的未定义行为问题（sdiv/smod指令），以及BPF_OR操作中maybe_fork_scalars()的标量分裂问题，同时修正了BPF_ADD_CONST32零扩展传播中的sync_linked_regs逻辑 [bpf: Fix undefined behavior in interpreter sdiv/smod for INT_MIN](#lkml-art_1774439410803_44eqrdjvi) [bpf: Fix unsound scalar forking in maybe_fork_scalars() for BPF_OR](#lkml-art_1774439410721_gu884ewt1) [bpf: Fix sync_linked_regs regarding BPF_ADD_CONST32 zext propagation](#lkml-art_1774439410628_bkacf32bt)

- 📁 **文件描述符和缓冲区修复**：修复了bootconfig工具在fstat失败时load_xbc_file()的文件描述符泄漏问题，以及io_uring在EOF时增量缓冲区的BUF_MORE标志缺失问题 [tools/bootconfig: fix fd leak in load_xbc_file() on fstat failure](#lkml-art_1774439412632_btb6tn9jx) [io_uring/kbuf: fix missing BUF_MORE for incremental buffers at EOF](#lkml-art_1774439411268_txi0uz0k9)

- ⚙️ **硬件监控驱动修复**：修复了max6639传感器的脉冲每转实现，以及isl68137 PMBus驱动中未检查的返回值问题并改用sysfs_emit()进行输出 [hwmon: (max6639) Fix pulses-per-revolution implementation](#lkml-art_1774439410936_e5gmyazuq) [hwmon: (pmbus/isl68137) Fix unchecked return value and use sysfs_emit()](#lkml-art_1774439412753_1gkmynvth)

- 🏗️ **ARM64和显存修复**：修复了ARM64 realm中52位物理地址支持的PTE_NS_SHARED标志问题，以及drm/xe驱动中CCS模式存储时遗漏的运行时PM引用和LRC上下文时间戳捕获中的未初始化问题 [arm64: realm: Fix PTE_NS_SHARED for 52bit PA support](#lkml-art_1774439411975_lc4g5zu4r) [drm/xe: Fix missing runtime PM reference in ccs_mode_store](#lkml-art_1774439411355_izp34mnrg) [drm/xe/lrc: Fix uninitialized new_ts when capturing context timestamp](#lkml-art_1774439411560_geuf5hynp)
